article_title: Burnaby Council — 13.1. Proposed Motion Cllr Lee - BC Housing Project 2026-02-10_.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on opposing BC Housing complex care project at 5389 Imperial Street
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council will consider a motion to formally refuse support for a proposed BC Housing supportive and complex care housing development at 5389 Imperial Street, following strong community opposition.
briefs.action_required: Attend the February 10 council meeting to follow the vote if this project affects your business or property.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — BC Housing Imperial Street motion

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Healthcare
